title: Extra Pets and Golems Mod
description:
Do you ever wanted to have better pets or have more powerful golems?

Well Extra Pets And Golems Mod will add bunch of pets and golems with unique abilities that may even defeat epic bosses like wither and many more!
body:
Do you ever wanted to have better pets or have more powerful golems?

Well Extra Pets And Golems Mod will add bunch of pets and golems with unique abilities that may even defeat epic bosses like wither and many more!

## Current Mobs:

Magnetic Golem:
Has 5 health and doesn’t fight.
Can be tamed with redstone.
When tamed will suck items towards it’s position.
Will die on contact with water.
Doesn’t spawn anywhere yet.

Chomper:
Has 20 health and will literally try to eat everyone also deals 10 damage per hit.
When ever will eat something will heal it self up.
Can be tamed with cookies.
Will even eat items and experience.
Every attack will cut though enemy flesh and heal it self by 1hp.
Doesn’t spawn anywhere yet.

Crystal Beast:
Has 20 health and doesn’t fight.
Can be tamed with diamonds.
When ever is tamed will give Haste II to it’s owner.
Doesn’t spawn anywhere yet.

Nightshade:
Has 50 health and will shoot life syphoning lazers into it’s enemies.
Will fly around, glide and steal enemies life.
Is immune to any physical damage and can only take melee damage.
Will cripple mobs around it by dealing 4 extra damage to them.
Can be tamed with Wither roses.
It’s lazer will deal 16 damage every tick and heal Nightshade by 8 health.
Doesn’t spawn anywhere yet

Straw Golem:
Has 20 health and deals 5 damage per hit.
Basically acts same as Iron Golem.
Takes more damage from fire.
Takes knockback.
Doesn’t spawn or can’t be created yet.

Wooden Golem:
Has 50 health and deals 10 damage per hit.
Basically acts same as Iron Golem.
It’s damage decreases over time as he can lose all his body parts while fightning.
Absorbs 1.5x taken damage.
Takes knockback.
Doesn’t spawn or can’t be created yet.

Stone Golem:
Has 100 health and deals 21 damage per hit 
Basically acts same as Iron Golem.
Absorbs 2.0x taken damage.
Is immune to most physical damage types.
Can’t be shoot by arrows.
Doesn’t take any knockback.
Doesn’t spawn or can’t be created yet.

Metallic Golem:
Has 140 health and deals 21 damage per hit.
Will shoot lazers at enemies that aren’t close.
Absorbs 10.0x taken damage.
Will attack any mob and can’t be controlled yet(WIP).
It’s eye lazer will deal 10 damage per tick and set enemies on fire.
Is basically a tank that can solo wither boss.
Doesn’t act same as Iron Golem though.
Doesn’t take any knockback.
Doesn’t spawn or can’t be created yet.

 

Currently these mobs will not spawn or can’t be created in survival.

This will change in the future though every suggestion will be gladly accepted also if you want to suggest your pet or golem be sure to comment down below! 


Mod Copyright for mod packs/distribution: [https://www.rolikdevelopment.com/mod-copyright/]

p.s by default when you tame pets they will stand still , so click one or sometimes two times to make them move again :)

Also golems will not display red glow hurt animation when attacked i have different animations planned for them in the future! :)
